narrative:
Trotwood 3-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 864 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.4 percentage points.
